title: [MTR4] NYC Subway R268
description: This resource pack adds the NYC Subway R268 to Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
This resource pack adds the NYC Subway R268 to Minecraft Transit Railway. It is a retexture of the R211T included in the mod.

In the future, I will add the R262 to this pack, which will be a retexture of the R142 that I will also make.
